task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the Moodle site as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Admin User' or 'admin' in the user profile menu at the top right of the Moodle interface, or the presence of the 'Site administration' menu indicating admin access.

task_completion.description: Verify the Full site name has been set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Springfield Technical College LMS' in the 'Full site name' input field on the Front page settings page, or displayed prominently in the site header/navigation bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the Short name for the site has been set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'STC Moodle' in the 'Short name for site' input field on the Front page settings page, or displayed in the top navigation bar or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Verify the Front page summary has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Welcome to the official learning platform for Springfield Technical College.' in the 'Front page summary' text area on the Front page settings page, or displayed on the actual front page of the site.

task_completion.description: Verify the Library custom menu item has been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Library|http://library.example.edu' in the 'Custom menu items' text area within Theme settings, or a 'Library' link visible in the top navigation menu of the site.

task_completion.description: Verify the Student Services custom menu item and its sub-items have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Student Services', '-Help Desk|http://help.example.edu', and '-Calendar|http://calendar.example.edu' on separate lines in the 'Custom menu items' text area, or a 'Student Services' dropdown menu in the top navigation containing 'Help Desk' and 'Calendar'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Moodle web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Moodle administration pages, not terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of clicking 'Save changes' at the bottom of the settings pages, or a success banner stating 'Changes saved'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the correct data into the correct fields rather than pasting the entire prompt somewhere.
integrity.visual_evidence: The site name, short name, summary, and menu items should be in their respective, distinct input fields, not lumped together in a single text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration values are: Full site name: 'Springfield Technical College LMS'. Short name: 'STC Moodle'. Front page summary must contain: 'Welcome to the official learning platform for Springfield Technical College'. The Custom menu items must be structured exactly as follows (often found in Appearance > Themes > Theme settings): 'Library|http://library.example.edu', 'Student Services', '-Help Desk|http://help.example.edu', and '-Calendar|http://calendar.example.edu'.
